headline: Did ESAB's (ESAB) New CFO and Rising Institutional Stake Just Reframe Its Governance Narrative?
summary: ESAB Corporation recently announced past and upcoming leadership changes, including the appointment of R. Brent Jones as Chief Financial Officer effective early May 2026, alongside the departure of current CFO Kevin Johnson and the promotion of Julie Han to Chief Accounting Officer and Corporate Controller. These shifts, combined with T. Rowe Price reporting beneficial ownership of 6,664,594 ESAB shares, highlight how both management turnover and institutional interest are shaping...
